heroDesc: Precision cutting, bending and structural fabrication
bodyTitle: Sheet Metal Fabrication from flat pattern to formed assembly
bodyDesc: Sheet metal fabrication is suited to enclosures, brackets, panels, mounting plates and lightweight structures. The ranges below are conservative engineering references; final tolerances depend on material, thickness, flat pattern size, bend count and finishing requirements.

panels.title: Geometry Fit
panels.subtitle: Enclosures / Brackets
panels.body: Best for parts with flat patterns, bends and hole relationships.

panels.title: Dimension Control
panels.subtitle: Drawing Review
panels.body: Single-face features are generally easier to hold than dimensions across bends.

panels.title: Finishing
panels.subtitle: Coating / Anodizing
panels.body: Can be paired with brushing, powder coating, anodizing and marking.

tableRows: Thicker or special stock needs review
Depends on thickness, heat and contour complexity
Springback and tooling radius affect results
Preferably no less than material thickness

steps.title: Drawing and flat-pattern check
steps.body: Confirm thickness, bend direction, hole-to-bend distance and cosmetic direction.

steps.title: Cutting and deburring
steps.body: Cut by laser, punching or waterjet and remove sharp edges.

steps.title: Bending and forming
steps.body: Control angle, dimensions and springback by datum edge and bend sequence.

steps.title: Finishing and assembly
steps.body: Complete coating, anodizing, inserts, welding or assembly inspection.

asideCta.title: Need a Manufacturing Plan?
asideCta.body: After drawings are submitted, engineers can review geometry, material and volume to suggest a suitable process route.

related.title: Related Process Recommendations
related.desc: Depending on geometry, material and delivery stage, other processes can be combined into a complete manufacturing flow.

items.title: Laser Cutting
items.body: Fast profile cutting for thin and medium sheet.

items.title: Surface Finishing
items.body: Improves appearance, corrosion resistance and assembly performance.

faq.title: Sheet Metal Fabrication FAQ
faq.desc: These answers help clarify fit, input files and quotation review before submitting a manufacturing request.

items.q: What projects is Sheet Metal Fabrication suitable for?
items.a: Sheet Metal Fabrication is suitable for projects that need manufacturing review based on drawings, material, quantity, tolerances and delivery goals, especially prototypes, low-volume parts and functional components.

items.q: What information is needed for a Sheet Metal Fabrication quote?
items.a: Prepare 3D files, 2D drawings when tolerances matter, material grade, quantity, finish requirements, inspection needs and target delivery timing so engineers can evaluate the route accurately.

items.q: How are lead time and cost confirmed for Sheet Metal Fabrication?
items.a: Lead time and cost are confirmed after reviewing geometry, material, process route, finishing, inspection scope and order quantity. Complex tolerances or special finishes may require engineering confirmation.

ctaDesc: Share drawings and requirements — our engineers will recommend a stable process route.
